functions.label: deployDemo
description:
Deploys a demo environment on Kubernetes (minikube) with telemetry data
being sent to Elasticsearch. Resolves when pods are ready — does NOT
block on log streaming.
signature:
({
  log,
  demoType = 'otel-demo',
  configPath,
  logsIndex = 'logs',
  version,
  scenarioIds = [],
  forceRebuildImages = false,
  useVanillaCollector = false,
}: { log:

| undefined; configPath?: string | undefined; logsIndex?: string | undefined; version?: string | undefined; scenarioIds?: string[] | undefined; forceRebuildImages?: boolean | undefined; useVanillaCollector?: boolean | undefined; }) => Promise<

children.label:
{
  log,
  demoType = 'otel-demo',
  configPath,
  logsIndex = 'logs',
  version,
  scenarioIds = [],
  forceRebuildImages = false,
  useVanillaCollector = false,
}

returnComment: A promise that resolves when the demo environment is deployed and the logs are streaming

functions.label: ensureMinikubeRunning
description: Starts minikube if not already running

functions.label: ensureOtelDemo
description:
Ensures a demo environment is running on Kubernetes (minikube) with
telemetry data being sent to Elasticsearch.

This function:
1. Ensures minikube is running
2. Reads Elasticsearch configuration from kibana.dev.yml
3. Enables the streams feature in Kibana (sets up logs index)
4. Generates OTel Collector configuration with k8sattributes processor
5. Generates Kubernetes manifests for the demo
6. Deploys to minikube using kubectl
signature:
({
  log,
  signal,
  demoType = 'otel-demo',
  configPath,
  logsIndex = 'logs',
  version,
  teardown = false,
  scenarioIds = [],
  forceRebuildImages = false,
  useVanillaCollector = false,
}: { log:

| undefined; configPath?: string | undefined; logsIndex?: string | undefined; version?: string | undefined; teardown?: boolean | undefined; scenarioIds?: string[] | undefined; forceRebuildImages?: boolean | undefined; useVanillaCollector?: boolean | undefined; }) => Promise<void>

children.label:
{

  signal,

  configPath,
  logsIndex = 'logs',
  version,

  useVanillaCollector = false,
}

returnComment: A promise that resolves when the demo environment is deployed and the logs are streaming

description:
Patches failure scenarios onto a running demo cluster.
Uses kubectl set env to update deployments without full redeployment.
signature: | undefined; scenarioIds?: string[] | undefined; reset?: boolean | undefined; }) => Promise<void>

functions.label: readKibanaConfig
description:
Reads Kibana configuration from a single config file.
Uses provided configPath or defaults to kibana.dev.yml.
Environment variables override config file values.

functions.label: requiresCustomImages
description: Check if a demo requires custom-built images

functions.label: resolveKibanaUrl
description:
Resolves the Kibana base URL by detecting if there's a dev mode base path.

When Kibana runs in dev mode without the `--no-base-path` flag, it uses a random
3-letter base path prefix (e.g., `/abc`). This function detects that by making
a request to the root URL and checking the redirect location.

children.label: kibanaHostname
description: - The base Kibana URL (e.g., "http://localhost:5601")

children.label: log
description: - Optional logger for debugging

returnComment: The Kibana URL with base path included (e.g., "http://localhost:5601/abc")

functions.label: streamDemoLogs
description:
Streams pod logs from a running demo deployment.
Blocks until the signal is aborted or the user presses Ctrl+C.
signature: ; namespace: string; signal?: AbortSignal | undefined; }) => Promise<void>

interfaces.label: DemoConfig
description: Configuration for a demo environment

children.label: id
description: Unique identifier for the demo

children.label: displayName
description: Human-readable display name

children.label: namespace
description: Kubernetes namespace for deployment

children.label: description
description: Description of the demo

children.label: defaultVersion
description: Default version to deploy

children.label: availableVersions
description: Available versions for this demo

children.label: frontendService
description: Frontend service configuration for external access

children.label: getServices
description: Function that returns service configurations for a specific version

children.label: requiresCustomImages
description:
If true, this demo requires custom-built container images that are not available
in public registries. Users must build and push images before deploying.

description: Instructions for building custom images when requiresCustomImages is true

children.label: imageBuildConfig
description: Configuration for automatic image building when requiresCustomImages is true
signature: { gitUrl: string; images: { name: string; context: string; dockerfile?: string | undefined; }[]; preBuildCommand?: string | undefined; } | undefined
